fixes_this_run: AB_HASH_IMPROVEMENT: record_outcome() in feedback/loop.py now uses hash((symbol,side,round(confidence),round(abs(pnl)*1000))%100 instead of i%100 (sequential index). Added _recent_ab_records List[Dict] to FeedbackLoop. AB splits now stable across evaluations — same trade always maps to same gate bucket.

TRENDING_MIN_HOLD_2H: New A/B_ACTIVE rule added to feedback/graduated_rules.json (gate=20%). Tracks noise stops in trending regime: if SL hit in <2h, flag as noise_stop_candidate. Based on forensics finding: wins hold 3.3h median vs losses 1.5h median. Exit agent should consider hold if within 2h and thesis intact.

high_priority_findings.finding: AB gate hash improved: record_outcome() was using sequential index (i%100) as ab_gate_hash — unstable, same trade gets different bucket depending on where in the deque it lands. Fixed to deterministic hash((symbol,side,conf,pnl))%100. Takes effect on bot restart.
high_priority_findings.estimated_impact: Cleaner A/B split measurements. 59 queued A/B rules will get more reliable treatment_wr estimates.

high_priority_findings.finding: TRENDING_MIN_HOLD_2H added as A/B_ACTIVE rule. Execution forensics show losses resolve 2x faster than wins (1.5h vs 3.3h). A minimum 2h hold guard in trending regime could prevent noise stops that resolve before the directional move materializes.
high_priority_findings.action: TRACKED. A/B gate at 20%. Exit agent should reference this rule when positions are <2h old in trending regime.
high_priority_findings.estimated_impact: Potential reduction in noise stops. If 20% of trending-regime SL hits are in the first 2h, preventing even half = material improvement.

high_priority_findings.finding: Bot offline 11.1 days. 7 graduated rules armed. 59 A/B rules awaiting live data. AB hash tracking now stable. Restart is the only path to progress.
